arts.ttl: Manchester United to Revisit Barcelona’s €60M-Rated Star in January Amid PSG Links
arts.sum: Earlier this month, a report from SPORT emerged stating that Paris Saint-Germain are monitoring the situation of FC Barcelona’s Frenkie de Jong closely. The Parisians are no strangers to taking away a player from FC Barcelona and now the capital club could be eyeing another in 2025. arts.ttl: Barcelona Confirms €250M Bid for Superstar Player, No Mention of PSG
arts.sum: This summer, there were rumors that Paris Saint-Germain was eyeing Lamine Yamal as a potential successor to Kylian Mbappé. Moreover, an FC Barcelona club chief confirms that they did receive a major offer, but doesn’t mention PSG by name. arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool Summer Target Would Bench Bradley Barcola, Claims Pundit
arts.sum: Bradley Barcola started this 2024-25 season to a fantastic start, but one pundit believes that Paris Saint-Germain can improve that left-wing position despite the young standout’s emergence. When Kylian Mbappé left PSG for Real Madrid, the Parisians didn’t opt to aggressively pursuit a left-winger and let Barcola take the reigns. arts.ttl: PSG, Tottenham Monitor Real Madrid Target as Chelsea Aim to Retain Player
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will have a decision coming up regarding their right-back position, Achraf Hakimi’s contract expires in 2026 and while he reportedly intends to extend his deal, nothing is signed yet. Moreover, there’s not much depth behind Hakim, so if the player goes down, PSG are in trouble. arts.ttl: Luis Enrique’s Stance on Pursuing Liverpool Star Next Summer Revealed in Latest Report
arts.sum: The future of Mohamed Salah at Liverpool remains uncertain as his current contract with the Reds expires next June. Over the past couple of weeks, the veteran winger has been linked to Paris Saint-Germain.
